info.title: NeoFin API
info.description:
## NeoFin — Advanced Financial Trading Platform

Full REST API for portfolio management, live market data, DeFi integrations, AI-powered insights, trading (paper & live), wallet management, analytics, security, learning center, and subscription management.

### Authentication
All protected routes require a **Bearer JWT** in the `Authorization` header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
```
Access tokens expire in **15 minutes**. Use `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh-token` with a refresh token (or cookie) to obtain new tokens.

### CSRF Protection
All `/api/v1` state-changing requests require the CSRF token header `x-csrf-token`. Obtain it via `GET /api/v1/csrf-token` before performing POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE.

### Response Envelope
All responses are wrapped in a standard envelope:
```json
{ "status": "success" | "error", "data": {}, "message": "..." }
```

### Plans
- **Basic** (free): limited features
- **Pro** ($29/mo): real-time data, AI insights
- **Enterprise** ($99/mo): DeFi, custom integrations, dedicated support

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /api/v1/auth/login

get.description: Returns server status, WebSocket connection count, and AI configuration.
Returns a CSRF token that must be included as the `x-csrf-token` header in all subsequent state-changing requests.

password.description: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, number, special char

example.message: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.

post.description: Provide the refresh token in the body **or** via the `refreshToken` HTTP-only cookie.
Invalidates the refresh token. Auth is NOT required (token may already be expired).

200.description: Password reset email sent if account exists

post.description: Returns a TOTP secret and QR code URL to scan with an authenticator app.

400.description: No file uploaded or invalid file type

get.summary: Get all market assets with prices

200.description: Asset detail with market cap, volume, OHLCV data
Market summary stats (total market cap, volume, BTC dominance)
Portfolio summary with total value, P&L, and asset list
ROI, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, alpha, beta
Asset allocation by symbol and type

post.description: **Requires Pro or Enterprise plan.** Places an order on a connected exchange.
Creates a virtual $100,000 paper trading portfolio.

200.description: Paper portfolio with holdings and P&L

signature.description: Required when type is 'external' for ownership verification

200.description: Gas prices (slow, standard, fast, instant) in Gwei
Stats: total count, volume, fees, by type
Protocol detail including TVL history and positions
Staking positions with APY and rewards

post.description: Returns an **unsigned transaction** to be signed by MetaMask.

200.description: Liquidity pools with TVL and APY
Total DeFi value, rewards, positions count

post.description: Builds an unsigned transaction payload for MetaMask to sign.
Called after MetaMask signs and broadcasts the transaction. Verifies on-chain and saves the position.

get.summary: Get chart history for a position

200.description: Performance metrics including ROI, Sharpe, drawdown, alpha, beta
Risk metrics: VaR, volatility, beta, Sharpe, Sortino
AI price predictions with confidence intervals
Sentiment score (-1 bearish to +1 bullish), breakdown by source
Risk assessment: VaR, volatility, concentration risk
Detected chart patterns with confidence scores
Personalized insights based on portfolio and activity
Current fear & greed index value and classification
Top trending coins by search volume

get.description: Returns fear/greed + BTC dominance + trending coins + top prices in a single call. Public endpoint.

200.description: Notifications with pagination and unread count
Stats: article count, video count, total views
Live news feed from external sources
2FA setup with secret and QR code

post.description: Sends a message to a Gemini 2.5 Flash AI assistant that has real-time access to the authenticated user's portfolio holdings, P&L, allocations, and live market prices. Supports multi-turn conversations via the `history` array. Falls back to a rule-based engine when `GEMINI_API_KEY` is not set.

message.example: Which of my assets has drifted the most from its target allocation?

reply.description: AI-generated text response referencing the user's actual portfolio
reply.example: Your BTC position has drifted +8.3% above its equal-weight target. Given current high volatility, this is an opportune time to trim and add to your underweight SOL position.

source.description: AI backend used for this response

422.description: Validation error — message missing or too long

get.description:
Analyses whether the portfolio should be rebalanced now by computing three signals:

1. **Drift** — actual vs. equal-weight target allocation per asset (default threshold: 5%)
2. **Volatility regime** — 14-day rolling vol on BTC used as a market proxy (low / normal / high / extreme)
3. **Staleness** — days elapsed since the last rebalance

These three signals are combined into a composite score (0–100). A score ≥ 60 triggers a rebalance recommendation. The `urgency` field maps score ranges to `none / low / medium / high`.

parameters.name: driftThreshold
parameters.description: Minimum absolute drift fraction to flag an asset (default: 0.05 = 5%)

parameters.name: scoreThreshold
parameters.description: Composite score threshold above which shouldRebalance becomes true

example: Market volatility is high — opportune time to rebalance.

post.description: **Do not call manually.** Receives Stripe webhook events (raw body). Requires `Stripe-Signature` header.
